title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Supported List - Other Devices
feature: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected
scenario: When no devices are connected, tapping "Supported Devices" link and then "Other devices" button displays correct text and opens Poly support products web page.
expected: Tapping the "Supported Devices" link displays text matching the Figma design. Tapping the "Other devices" button opens the Poly support products web page.
